title: Minebox Clear Leaves
description: Restores classic Minecraft leaf visuals, adds seasonal leaf variants, and boosts performance by reducing FPS load.
body:
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Kb8wWhwz/images/c06f44d31807fc8e9a80dd9d642ba07a2ba66eee.png)

This is an add-on for **[Minebox Plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minebox-plus)** that modifies how leaves appear in the game. It removes the default **Bushy Leaves** effect from Minebox, restoring the **classic leaf style** for a cleaner, more traditional look. In addition to that, this add-on introduces new **seasonal leaf variants**, allowing you to switch between different styles depending on the season: - 🌱 **Spring / Summer** — vibrant green tones - 🍂 **Autumn** — warm, golden-brown shades - ❄️ **Winter (coming soon)** — snowy, frosted leaves These options not only offer visual variety but can also **significantly improve performance** on lower-end systems by reducing the FPS load caused by complex leaf models.
> ### 🌐 **Language Support** > All configuration options and in-game settings are available in **English (EN)**, **Polish (PL)**, and **French (FR)**. > Language is automatically detected based on your Minecraft language settings.
> ### ⚙️ Requirements > This add-on requires installing a mod that allows changing the **priority of the server’s resource packs**. You can use, for example, the [Serverpack Priority](https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpack-priority) mod to ensure this pack loads correctly.
> ### **Note:** > If you’re using **Minebox Plus v3.0.0 or newer**, this add-on’s functionality is **already included** as part of the pack’s built-in **Leaves Settings** options. > You only need this add-on if you’re using an earlier version of Minebox Plus or prefer a standalone installation.
--- > ### 🌐 Minebox Server [(Server Page)](https://minebox.co/) > **Minebox** combines **MMORPG**, **Skyblock** gameplay into a unique experience. Explore uncharted islands, gather rare materials, and battle powerful creatures — all while discovering a world full of secrets and adventure.

> ### 🌍 **Minebox Community** > Want to explore more **community-driven projects**, **add-ons**, and **useful systems** for Minebox? > Visit [**mineboxcommunity.com**](https://mineboxcommunity.com) — a central hub for everything related to Minebox. > There you’ll find a growing collection of resources, guides, and packs created by both developers and players, all aimed at enhancing and expanding the Minebox experience.
